assertionResults.title: Sign trigger dispatches a command and registers a pending operation
assertionResults.reason: A valid Test Sign click created a fresh sign request_id in signDispatchLog and a corresponding Sign pending_operation was observed within the next tick window.

steps.action: Capture baseline sign pending count and dispatch ids
steps.observed: signPendingCount=0, dispatchIds had no new id for this attempt

steps.action: Enter valid 64-hex message and click Test Sign
steps.expected: Runtime handleCommand(sign) dispatches with fresh request_id
Pending Sign grows by exactly one and includes new request_id

evidence.network: Relay online via AppState runtimeRelays: ws://127.0.0.1:8194

assertionResults.title: Happy-path sign completion (multi-device) surfaces in AppState
assertionResults.reason: With two seeded dashboard tabs on the same local relay, sign request_id f9d2cf07ae115c0c0b1eb5bee6da95f4 completed on instance A, was removed from pending, and success surfaced in the Recent Sign Activity UI as completed.

steps.action: Seed tab A and tab B runtime sessions and verify relay online
steps.expected: Two active browser instances participate on ws://127.0.0.1:8194
steps.observed: Both tabs had runtimeRelays[0].state='online' and signReady=true

steps.action: Dispatch Test Sign on tab A with valid 64-hex message
steps.expected: Fresh sign request_id tracked in AppState

steps.action: Check completion and pending correlation on tab A
steps.expected: Completion for request_id exists and pending entry removed

steps.observed: Recent Sign Activity row shows SIGN + message preview + completed

evidence.network: Relay state online in both tabs at ws://127.0.0.1:8194

assertionResults.title: Completions are drained every tick and not silently discarded
assertionResults.reason: The drained Sign completion for request_id f9d2cf07ae115c0c0b1eb5bee6da95f4 was present in AppState runtimeCompletions and surfaced into UI (Recent Sign Activity completed row), confirming it was not dropped.

steps.action: Dispatch sign and read AppState completion slice
Inspect UI reaction within assertion window
steps.observed: Recent Sign Activity displayed completed state for the dispatched sign

evidence.network: Relay remained online at ws://127.0.0.1:8194 during completion observation

frictions.description: Intermittent stale SigningFailed modal from background ping timeouts blocked Test Sign clicks during rerun setup.
frictions.resolution: Dismissed modal before dispatch attempts; then re-ran assertion capture.

frictions.description: agent-browser network request capture did not provide websocket frame-level records in this run.
frictions.resolution: Used AppState relay observability (runtimeRelays + request_id correlation) as network evidence.
